mapper.select:
SELECT active_warehouses as "activeWarehouses", total_skus as "totalSkus", low_stock_items as "lowStockItems", out_of_stock_items as "outOfStockItems", pending_fulfillments as "pendingFulfillments", shipped_today as "shippedToday", pending_pick_lists as "pendingPickLists" FROM hm_query.wms_overview_stats_flat
AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND warehouse_id = '__ALL__'

SELECT line_item_id as "lineItemId", fulfillment_order_id as "fulfillmentOrderId", order_item_id as "orderItemId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", sku as "sku", quantity_ordered as "quantityOrdered", quantity_allocated as "quantityAllocated", quantity_picked as "quantityPicked", quantity_packed as "quantityPacked", quantity_shipped as "quantityShipped", quantity_short as "quantityShort", bin_location as "binLocation", item_status as "itemStatus", product_name as "productName", brand as "brand", weight_grams as "weightGrams", unit_price as "unitPrice", total_price as "totalPrice" FROM hm_query.wms_fulfillment_line_items_flat WHERE fulfillment_order_id = #{fulfillmentOrderId} ORDER BY sku
